emailVerification.heading: Hi, {name}!
emailVerification.paragraphMain: Thank you for registering! We are happy to welcome you to our community. Please click the button below to confirm your email and complete your registration.
emailVerification.paragraphDescription: This link is valid for 3 hours. If you haven't created an account, simply ignore this email.
emailVerification.footer: If the button doesn't work, copy this link into your browser:

emailAlreadyRegistered.preview: Sign in to your AI Smart Dictionary account
emailAlreadyRegistered.heading: Welcome back, {name}!
emailAlreadyRegistered.paragraphMain: We received a request to sign up with this email address. However, you already have an account with us. You don't need to register again.
emailAlreadyRegistered.paragraphDescription: If you want to access your account, simply click the button above. If you didn't try to sign up, you can safely ignore this email.
emailAlreadyRegistered.footer: If the button above doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
